title: SetHome GUI
description: Have your users establish a home and teleport to it.
body:
Do you like the plugin? Leave a review! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Text Transscript ## SetHomeGUI [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/3k4MbQ3KNv) - [Wiki](https://beeted-plugins.gitbook.io/beeted-plugins/sethome-gui/installation) - [Premium](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/%E2%AD%90-sethome-gui-%E2%AD%90-1-13-26-1-2-set-up-and-travel-to-your-home.130299/) ### FEATURES - **Create Homes** - Create infinite homes. - **Delete Homes** - Delete your homes easily. - **Default permission** - Set a default use permission. - **GUI Based System** - Do everything from the GUI. - **Limit of Homes** - Limit of homes per user/group. - **Titles and Subtitles** - Create titles and subtitles. - **Actionbars** - Create custom actionbars. - **Messages** - Send custom messages. - **TP Cooldown** - Wait to be teleported. - **Customizable GUI** - Everything is customizable. - **World Blacklist** - Disable specific worlds. - **Admin GUI** - GUI admin system. - **HEX Colors** - Supports hex colors. - **Import System** - Import from other plugins. - **Placeholders** - PlaceholderAPI support. ### GUI BASED **Do everything on one menu!** You can create, delete and view your homes from a 100% customizable menu. Don't want to use the menu? Use the usual commands to set and delete a home! - /home - /delhome ### ACTIONS **Use static or cooldown actions!** You can configure all kinds of actions for teleportation in a static or cooldown manner. ### IMPORT **Import data from other plugins** Migrate data from your old popular sethome plugins to this plugin without any problems. You can import from EssentialsX and HuskHomes. ### GUI CREATION **Customize the menus** - Menu creation system to customize menus to your liking! **Heads Support** - Add any head or player head to the menus! **Size, Update Interval, Slots, Sounds, Fill Items and much more to add!**
